description: R1d direct-capability vectors. Each vector's expectedFacts/status/reasons/diagnostics were produced by the REAL al-sem capability extractors run on a PRE-RESOLVE routine (`projectDirectCapabilities` → `extractCapabilities`, NOT analyzeWorkspace/the summary pass). Facts are STRIPPED of L3 `resourceId` + redundant `subject` + deep-stripped of nested `table-field.tableId`; `op:'publish'` facts are EXCLUDED (L4-injected). status/reasons are the extractor's OWN return value (NOT the L4-augmented coverage). Universal invariants (provenance=='direct', via=='self', no publish, no resourceId, no nested tableId) are asserted on EVERY vector plus per-family hand-authored invariants, all checked against the live facts before emit. Rust loads this committed file and asserts parity.

vectors.name: table_crud_ops
vectors.description: FindSet→read, Modify→modify, Insert→insert, Delete→delete; each carries TableExtra with opSubtype = the RecordOpType and the receiver's tempState. resourceId STRIPPED.
invariants: every direct fact has provenance=='direct'
every direct fact has via=='self'
NO op:'publish' fact (L4-injected, excluded at L2)
NO fact carries a resourceId (L3, stripped)
NO nested ValueSource carries a tableId (L3, deep-stripped)
FindSet → op=read, resourceKind=table, opSubtype=FindSet
Modify → op=modify, opSubtype=Modify
Insert → op=insert
Delete → op=delete
every table fact carries a witnessOperationId (record-op witness)
status complete (clean extraction)

vectors.name: commit_op
vectors.description: a bare Commit() → op=commit, resourceKind=transaction, witnessOperationId set.
invariants: every direct fact has provenance=='direct'
every direct fact has via=='self'
NO op:'publish' fact (L4-injected, excluded at L2)
NO fact carries a resourceId (L3, stripped)
NO nested ValueSource carries a tableId (L3, deep-stripped)
Commit → op=commit, resourceKind=transaction

vectors.name: dispatch_execute_modal

invariants: every direct fact has provenance=='direct'
every direct fact has via=='self'
NO op:'publish' fact (L4-injected, excluded at L2)
NO fact carries a resourceId (L3, stripped)
NO nested ValueSource carries a tableId (L3, deep-stripped)
Codeunit.Run → execute, dispatch extra objectType=Codeunit, NOT modal
Page.RunModal → execute, dispatch extra objectType=Page, modal=true
dispatch resourceArgSource is enum/database-reference (static)

url resourceArgSource is a literal (static)
bodyArgSource present in HttpExtra

every direct fact has via=='self'
NO op:'publish' fact (L4-injected, excluded at L2)
NO fact carries a resourceId (L3, stripped)
NO nested ValueSource carries a tableId (L3, deep-stripped)
subscriber → exactly one subscribe fact, eventClass=Integration
NO publish fact (L4-injected, excluded at L2)

vectors.name: unreachable_record_op_no_fact
vectors.description: a record op AFTER a bare Error() (controlContext=='unreachable') produces NO capability fact AND emits an index-stage unreachable diagnostic. The reachable FindSet BEFORE the Error still produces its read fact.

expectedDiagnostics.message: unreachable code: record-op after terminating statement

invariants: every direct fact has provenance=='direct'
every direct fact has via=='self'
NO op:'publish' fact (L4-injected, excluded at L2)
NO fact carries a resourceId (L3, stripped)
NO nested ValueSource carries a tableId (L3, deep-stripped)
the reachable FindSet still produces a read fact
the unreachable Modify produces NO modify fact
at least one index-stage unreachable diagnostic was captured
a diagnostic message mentions unreachable code

vectors.name: record_op_name_on_non_record_no_table_fact
vectors.description: `Facade.Get(...)` where Facade is a Codeunit (not a Record) — receiver-type-aware classification routes it to a callSite, NOT a recordOperation — so it produces NO table fact (and none of the IO families match the bare method either).
invariants: every direct fact has provenance=='direct'
every direct fact has via=='self'
NO op:'publish' fact (L4-injected, excluded at L2)
NO fact carries a resourceId (L3, stripped)
NO nested ValueSource carries a tableId (L3, deep-stripped)
NO table fact (record-op name on a non-Record receiver)

vectors.name: table_field_argsource_tableid_stripped
vectors.description: an HTTP url sourced from a record field member-expression (`Setup.Endpoint`) classifies as a `table-field` ValueSource — at L2 its tableId is 'unknown' and STRIPPED from the projection. Assert the projected ValueSource is kind=table-field WITHOUT a tableId key.
invariants: every direct fact has provenance=='direct'
every direct fact has via=='self'
NO op:'publish' fact (L4-injected, excluded at L2)
NO fact carries a resourceId (L3, stripped)
NO nested ValueSource carries a tableId (L3, deep-stripped)
url resourceArgSource is a table-field with NO tableId key

vectors.name: opaque_override_parse_incomplete
vectors.description: a routine whose body has a parse error (`parseIncomplete===true`) hits the L2 opaque override (summary-runner.ts:509-513): facts=[], status='unknown', reasons=['parse-incomplete']. Even though the body had record ops, NO facts survive (the override clears them). (The OTHER opaque branch — bodyAvailable===false — yields reasons=['opaque-dependency']; both are exercised by the same override.)
invariants: every direct fact has provenance=='direct'
every direct fact has via=='self'
NO op:'publish' fact (L4-injected, excluded at L2)
NO fact carries a resourceId (L3, stripped)
NO nested ValueSource carries a tableId (L3, deep-stripped)
parse-incomplete routine → facts empty (override clears them)
parse-incomplete routine → status unknown
parse-incomplete routine → reasons exactly ['parse-incomplete']
